name: Sit N Stay
description: Sit n Stay is a full service petcare company in Burein, Washington. was a website I did in collaboration with Montana Banana. It's a custom designed theme built on a WordPress. This was a fun project as it allowed us to be creative, such as the hover events over the navigation and paws on the call to action. I especially enjoyed working on the color mosaic on the services page. Not only does the services mosaic design look good, but it was a good practice in how to make things responsive for mobile.

name: Jacob Lawrence
description: Jacob and Gwen Lawrence is a information resource for the artist Jacob Lawrence. This website is built on WordPress with a custom built photo gallery plugin. Not only was this project fun, but it was also extremely informative to learn about the lives of the artists. I like how we were able to tie in his art along with the content to make his website an art piece of its own. A colloboration with Montana Banana.

name: Progress Virginia Education Fund
description: Progress Virginia Education Fund is a nonprofit located in Virginia. Built on WordPress on 3 days due to a short timeline.
